items.name: Chatpate
items.description: A version of chaat, made with puffed rice, Wai-Wai noodles, fresh coriander, tomato, onion, potato, lemon, fresh chilli & spices.

items.name: Pani Puri
items.description: A deep-fried crisp flatbread, filled with a mixture of flavoured water, mashed potato and herbs.

items.name: Goat Bhutan
items.description: Stir fried goat tripe with onion, garlic, and tomato and side of bitten rice.

items.name: Shavale
items.description: Deeply fried home-made pastry dough, filled with chicken mince.

items.name: Jhaneko Sekuwa
items.description: Grilled and stir-fried meat/veg with Himalayan spices.

items.name: Laphing
items.description: A spicy and savory cold noodle dish made from white wheat flour.

items.name: Chicken Choila
items.description: Spiced & chargrilled meat with home-made spices.

items.name: Chicken / Veg / Buff Chilli
items.description: Tossed on Szechuan chilli sauce with diced onion capsicum and tomato.

items.name: Daarlagdo Wings
items.description: Marinated wings with levels of spicy (medium | spicy | hot).

items.name: Timmuri Chicken
items.description: Crispy chicken with garlic and szechuan.

items.name: Pokhareli Thicheko Aalu
items.description: Lightly smashed potato with home-made spices.

items.name: Keema Noodle
items.description: Flat noodles served with topped with a chicken mince flavour with timur (sichuan), garlic & soy.

items.name: Steam Momo
items.description: 10 pcs dumplings.

items.name: Jhol Momo
items.description: 10 pcs dumplings.

items.name: C. Momo
items.description: Chilli momo. 10 pcs dumplings.

items.name: Fried Momo
items.description: 10 pcs dumplings.

items.name: Sadheko Momo
items.description: 10 pcs dumplings.

items.name: Mo:Mo Platter
items.description: Steam 4pcs, fried 4pcs, chilly 4pcs, sadheko 4pcs.

items.name: Chowmein
items.description: Stir fried egg noodles with nepalese spices. Extra egg +$2.

items.name: Fried Rice
items.description: Homestyle stir fried rice with nepali spices. Extra egg +$2.

items.name: Khana Set
items.description: Boiled rice, choice of curry, lentil (daal), spinach (saag) with a side of white radish pickle (mula ko achar), karela (bitter gourd) and mixed pickles, assorted with yogurt/gulab jamun, papadum and ghee (optional).

items.name: Jhaneko Sekuwa Set
items.description: Choice of meat/paneer, peanut sadheko, bhuja, aloo achaar, mula achaar, boiled egg, and salads.
